title: LS2 FF396

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb impact energy across varying zones of the head, significantly reducing rotational forces during an accident. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber composite overmolded onto an ABS core, offering a superior strength-to-weight ratio that enhances rider agility without compromising structural integrity. Integrated with LS2's proprietary 'Air Flow' channeling system, the ventilation architecture directs cool air from the chin bar to the rear vents, optimizing thermal regulation during high-speed runs.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of cutting-edge technology and timeless style with the LS2 FF396. Designed for the modern rider who demands uncompromising safety without sacrificing aerodynamic performance, this helmet features a sleek carbon-fiber aesthetic that turns heads on every ride. Whether you are carving through canyon roads or cruising the open highway, the FF396 delivers a secure, comfortable fit that keeps you focused on the journey ahead.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF396 full-face helmet: lightweight carbon fiber construction, ECE 22.06 certified safety, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding comfort and style.
